productDisplayName: iD Men's Casual Strapped Leather Brown Shoe
description: Composition:Brown leather with white stitches, swoosh straps, slip-onWash Care:Use a branded leather conditioner to keep it clean and shiny through all seasonsDo you love to wear trendy and fashionable sneakers but feel lazy to tie laces? Then id footwear has a solution. This pair of uber cool shoes are a great imitation of sneakers. Perfect for an outing with friends or for a slog out at work on a weekend, they look fab with any type of casual wear. Experiment with certain ethnic wear too to make that slick style statement. Either way, you'll look great!
